title: Jump Start Module Manifest
description: Schema for validating Jump Start add-on module manifests.

description.description: Human-readable description of the module's purpose.

homepage.description: URL to the module's homepage or repository.

jumpstart.description: Required Jump Start framework version range.

agents.description: Relative paths to agent persona files this module provides.

templates.description: Relative paths to template files this module provides.

commands.description: Relative paths to command definition files this module provides.

checks.description: Relative paths to quality check scripts this module provides.

skills.description: Relative paths to skill directories this module provides.

dependencies.description: Other Jump Start modules this module depends on.
